Authors: Jingru Xue, Lichao Zhou, Peng Kang, Xiangming Cai, Pingping Chen, Yi Fang
Abstract: In this paper, we investigate the performance of protograph-based low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes for rate-diverse two-user Gaussian multiple access channel (GMAC). Abstract: In this paper, a neural belief propagation decoder of double polar codes for joint source-channel coding (JSCC) is proposed.
